name_cn:
🎉Bonnie Oil Wax Leather🎉🎉
This Bonnie features imported oil wax leather with a glossy sheen that exudes a classical vibe. It comes with two detachable long/short shoulder straps for shoulder or crossbody wear. It offers a very large capacity and is incredibly practical👏. An essential piece for fashionistas, bring this retro-style crossbody bag home now!
Model: 1BC297
Size: 26x18x9cm
